cards.back: A technique for a process to invoke a program or procedure on another computer over a network
A communication protocol used for remote invocation, where one process invokes a procedure and receives the result in a separate communication
A standard procedure for invoking a procedure on a remote computer, which allows for communication between different computers over a network
A technique for invoking methods on an object in another Java program, allowing for distributed object communication and collaboration
A design pattern where one computer (client) requests services from another computer (server) over a network, commonly used in remote invocation
